title: Al-Rashid's journey from Jurjan to Tns
description: In this year, Harun reached jurjan in $afar (November-December, 8o8), and there met him in Jurjan the treasuries of 'Ali b. 'Isa, conveyed on the backs of fifteen hundred camels.1002 After this, he set out from jurjan, according to what has been mentioned, in $afar, in a sick state, to '],'us, where he remained till he died. He became suspicious of Harthamah, so he sent his son al-Ma'mun twentythree nights before he died to Marw, accompanied by'Abdallah b. Malik, Y4ya b. Mu'adh, Asad b. Yazid b. Mazyad, al-'Abbas b. ja'far b. Mubammad b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
